title: Clean announce processor (Rust+Python)
description: Align rust/lichen-node/src/announce.rs and python/src/lichen/announce/processor.py (plus coords.py,scheduler.py). Fix merge artifacts (evicted_iid, validate, reexports, ponytail comment). Remove all 'Why:' comments, dead code, TODOs. Resolve update ordering divergence to exactly match pseudocode in spec. Use test vector oracles ONLY.
notes: Claimed. Explored with subagent: identified duplicate reexport in lib.rs, Why: comments in 3 files, ordering divergence in process() (Rust does seen-before-gradient; Python+spec does gradient-before-LRU). Approach: strip all Why comments/docs, dedup reexport, reorder Rust process to gradient-first then pinned/seen (matches pseudocode in spec/05-routing.md:450-475 and Python), keep evicted_iid+eviction logic+vector oracle tests only. No TODOs found. Parallel edits next.
